name: Sinon.JS
description: Sinon.JS — Standalone JavaScript library providing test spies, stubs, and mocks compatible with any test runner.

seo.title: Sinon.JS — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Sinon.JS: Standalone library of test spies, stubs and mocks for JavaScript, works with any unit testing framework and is the de-facto mocking tool.

when_to_use: Test spies tracking calls, arguments, and return values
Stubs replacing functions with controllable behavior
Mock timers for testing setTimeout and setInterval code
Framework-agnostic: works with Mocha, Jest, or QUnit

pros: Works with Mocha, Jest, Vitest, etc.
Timers and fake XHR helpers included
cons: Jest and Vitest have built-in mocks now
API surface is larger than most teams need
review.verdict: Still useful for non-Jest runners, though built-in mocking in Jest and Vitest covers most new projects.
review.best_for: JavaScript teams using Mocha or other runners without built-in mocking
review.not_for: Jest or Vitest projects where native mocks remove the dependency
